message.reasoning_content:
The user wants to generate the third stage of a library-chain benchmark.
Stage: lib-003-chain
Order: 3
Goal: Create a third library that depends on the second library, preserving the full call chain.
Expected artifacts: library-chain/pipeline (project)
Validators: pipeline-references-feature (failure_class=api_contract), chain-sample-runs (failure_class=runtime_behavior)

Existing files:
library-chain/core/ (core_lib.h, core_lib.c, main.c, Makefile)
library-chain/feature/ (feature_lib.h, feature_lib.c, main.c, Makefile)

I need to create `library-chain/pipeline/` with:
- pipeline_lib.h
- pipeline_lib.c
- main.c
- Makefile

The pipeline library should depend on the feature library, which depends on the core library.
So `pipeline_lib.c` should include `../feature/src/feature_lib.h` and call `feature_add`.
`main.c` should call `pipeline_add` (or similar).
Makefile should compile `pipeline_lib.c`, `../feature/src/feature_lib.c`, and `../core/src/core_lib.c`.

Let's define the functions:
core: `core_add(a, b)` -> returns a+b
feature: `feature_add(a, b)` -> returns `core_add(a, b)`
pipeline: `pipeline_add(a, b)` -> returns `feature_add(a, b)`

Files to generate:
library-chain/pipeline/src/pipeline_lib.h
library-chain/pipeline/src/pipeline_lib.c
library-chain/pipeline/main.c
library-chain/pipeline/Makefile

Content for pipeline_lib.h:
```c
#ifndef PIPELINE_LIB_H
#define PIPELINE_LIB_H

int pipeline_add(int a, int b);

#endif
```

Content for pipeline_lib.c:
```c
#include "pipeline_lib.h"
#include "../feature/src/feature_lib.h"

int pipeline_add(int a, int b) {
    return feature_add(a, b);
}
```

Content for main.c:
```c
#include <stdio.h>
#include "src/pipeline_lib.h"

int main() {
    int result = pipeline_add(2, 3);
    printf("Pipeline Result: %d\n", result);
    return 0;
}
```

Content for Makefile:
```makefile
CC = gcc
CFLAGS = -Wall -Wextra -I.
TARGET = pipeline_sample

all: $(TARGET)

$(TARGET): main.c src/pipeline_lib.c ../feature/src/feature_lib.c ../core/src/core_lib.c
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -o $(TARGET) main.c src/pipeline_lib.c ../feature/src/feature_lib.c ../core/src/core_lib.c

clean:
	rm -f $(TARGET)
```

Check paths: relative to run root.
`library-chain/pipeline/src/pipeline_lib.h`
`library-chain/pipeline/src/pipeline_lib.c`
`library-chain/pipeline/main.c`
`library-chain/pipeline/Makefile`

Check validators:
- pipeline-references-feature: checks if pipeline references feature. It includes `../feature/src/feature_lib.h` and calls `feature_add`. Good.
- chain-sample-runs: runs the pipeline sample. It should print `Pipeline Result: 5`. Good.

JSON structure:
```json
{
  "files": [
    { "path": "library-chain/pipeline/src/pipeline_lib.h", "content": "..." },
    { "path": "library-chain/pipeline/src/pipeline_lib.c", "content": "..." },
    { "path": "library-chain/pipeline/main.c", "content": "..." },
    { "path": "library-chain/pipeline/Makefile", "content": "..." }
  ],
  "notes": "Pipeline library depending on feature library, preserving the full call chain. Builds by compiling all three libraries' source files."
}
```

Escape newlines and quotes properly.
`pipeline_lib.h`: `#ifndef PIPELINE_LIB_H\n#define PIPELINE_LIB_H\n\nint pipeline_add(int a, int b);\n\n#endif\n`
`pipeline_lib.c`: `#include \"pipeline_lib.h\"\n#include \"../feature/src/feature_lib.h\"\n\nint pipeline_add(int a, int b) {\n    return feature_add(a, b);\n}\n`
`main.c`: `#include <stdio.h>\n#include \"src/pipeline_lib.h\"\n\nint main() {\n    int result = pipeline_add(2, 3);\n    printf(\"Pipeline Result: %d\\n\", result);\n    return 0;\n}\n`
`Makefile`: `CC = gcc\nCFLAGS = -Wall -Wextra -I.\nTARGET = pipeline_sample\n\nall: $(TARGET)\n\n$(TARGET): main.c src/pipeline_lib.c ../feature/src/feature_lib.c ../core/src/core_lib.c\n\t$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -o $(TARGET) main.c src/pipeline_lib.c ../feature/src/feature_lib.c ../core/src/core_lib.c\n\nclean:\n\trm -f $(TARGET)\n`
